searches.query: trending cloud computing topics AWS Azure
searches.answer: Hybrid and multi-cloud strategies, containerization, and AI/ML advancements are trending in cloud computing for AWS and Azure. Serverless computing and Kubernetes are also popular. Projects focusing on machine learning and disaster recovery are prominent.

results.title: Trends in Cloud Adoption and Modernization with AWS and Azure
results.content: # Trends in Cloud Adoption and Modernization with AWS and Azure. In this blog post, we will explore three key trends shaping how businesses migrate and modernize their workloads in Amazon Web Services (AWS) and Microsoft Azure, two of the leading cloud platforms. One of the most significant trends in cloud adoption is the increasing popularity of hybrid and multi-cloud strategies. Hybrid cloud configurations involve a mix of on-premises infrastructure, private cloud, and public cloud services. *

searches.answer: Kubernetes v1.37 is the latest release, with Docker support deprecated since version 1.20. Kubernetes now focuses on other runtimes for container management. The Kubernetes project maintains recent minor releases for about a year of support.
